name: Sopa De Albondigas
recipeIngredient: 6 Cilantro sprigs, chopped (including stems and leaves)
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the meatballs: Mix all ingredients and shape into 3/4-inch meatballs.
2. Bring the broth to a low simmer and add the vegetables. Add the meatballs and top them with the paste. Cover and simmer over low heat for 30 minutes.
3. Serve hot in bowls, with tortillas.
Note: I like to make my own beef broth for all recipes, but particularly for this one, as it needs a rather strong broth. This recipe is from the book False Tongues and Sunday Bread by Copeland Marks.
